name: Noh-P.U.N.K. Deer Note
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ノウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ．Ｕ．Ｎ．Ｋ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>パンク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ディア・ノート
desc: You can reveal 1 other "P.U.N.K." monster in your hand; Special Summon either the revealed monster or this card, and send the other to the GY. If this card is sent from the field to your GY: You can target 1 "P.U.N.K." monster in your GY, except a Level 5 monster; Special Summon it, but you cannot Special Summon "Noh-P.U.N.K. Deer Note" for the rest of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Noh-P.U.N.K. Deer Note" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
